lora.derived_from: Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-ROMANCE-en (Portuguese is one of 6 Romance source languages this multilingual MarianMT model handles)
lora.note: Helsinki-NLP does not publish a Portuguese-only opus-mt-pt-en. Their canonical Portuguese-source path is opus-mt-ROMANCE-en (multilingual Romance→English). This WindyWord repo wraps those weights with a Portuguese-specific name to satisfy installer / consumer expectations for translate-pt-en.

examination_log.rationale: The Windy Pro installer's MODEL_REGISTRY has a windy-pair-pt-en entry, but no Portuguese-only Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-pt-en exists upstream. Helsinki's canonical path for Portuguese-source translation is opus-mt-ROMANCE-en (68k+ downloads), which handles Portuguese alongside Italian/Spanish/French/Catalan/Romanian as source languages. This port wraps those weights under a pt-en namespace so installer URL construction works without the wizard needing special-case logic. The README on WindyWord/translate-pt-en clearly discloses the ROMANCE-derived nature.
examination_log.underlying_lineage: identical to WindyWord/translate-ROMANCE-en — same weights, different namespace

examination_log.method: ADR-039 Phase C — upload-from-local clone WindyWord/translate-<pid> → WindstormLabs/translate-<pid>
examination_log.notes: ADR-039 Phase C bulk migration; WindyWord left intact.

quality_rating.label: Standard
quality_rating.note: Inherits ROMANCE-en quality; not WER-audited as a Portuguese-specific pair yet. Community downloads (68k on Helsinki) suggest production-grade Portuguese coverage.
